diff_summary: Dead code removal only (net -14 lines). Removed all references to deprecated /tmp/claude-bulk-allowed-*.flag path from comments, case patterns, and error messages across three hook scripts. No new logic, no new code paths.

Chinese in hooks/README-TODO-INJECTION.md, hooks/pretool-bisect-gate.sh:24, hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py:11, hooks/userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh:45 are all pre-existing and outside the --changed-files scope.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed zero new diff-scoped violations is correct. Single observation: rationale #6 should not imply the agents/style-inspector.md:333 mascot-label exemption covers the Chinese diagnostic at hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:1233 -- those are two independent items. The line 1233 Chinese text is out of scope solely because it is pre-existing and outside the changed hunks, not because of the mascot exemption.

findings.issue: Rationale #6 mentions agents/style-inspector.md:333 exemption alongside hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:1233 in a way that could imply the mascot exemption covers line 1233. These are independent: line 1233 is out of scope because it is pre-existing/outside diff hunks, not because of the mascot exemption.
findings.rationale: Observation is accurate. The two items in rationale #6 are independent: (1) line 1233 Chinese is pre-existing/outside diff, and (2) agents/style-inspector.md:333 has its own exemption. Report text clarifies these are separate items in standards_passed and standard_6_unconditional_scan sections.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Clarified report structure to clearly separate the two Standard 6 items: pre-existing Chinese at line 1233 (outside diff range) vs. documented mascot-label exemption at agents/style-inspector.md:333. No violations added or removed.
